use_cases: Triggering actions or events within a web application interface
Submitting forms with primary or destructive button variants
Navigating between pages or sections using ghost or link button styles
Creating icon-only buttons for compact toolbar or navigation areas
Building accessible interactive controls with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and standard Tailwind CSS styling. Features proper accessibility attributes including focus-visible rings and disabled states.
